title: Power surge, loud noises reported in Oswego came from steam station
summary: A power surge and loud noises reported in Oswego on July 3, 2026 were caused by a safety feature activation at the Oswego Harbor Power steam station (formerly Niagara Mohawk Oswego Steam Station). City officials confirmed the incident was mechanical in nature and not a public safety threat. This is relevant to CIO infrastructure monitoring if Syracuse systems share interdependencies with regional power infrastructure.
processing_notes: Article focuses on Oswego (external municipality), not directly Syracuse operations
No Syracuse department involvement or IT infrastructure impact mentioned
Incident appears resolved; safety feature functioned as designed
